Package classwork

Class EmpDoc

java.lang.Object
classwork.EmpDoc
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<EmpDoc>
public class EmpDoc extends Object implements Comparable<EmpDoc>
The Emp class represents an Employee entity.

This class contains basic employee details such as:

  • Employee ID
  • Employee Name
  • Employee Salary

This class implements the Comparable interface to allow sorting of Employee objects based on their employee ID.

Natural ordering is defined by empId in ascending order.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Shruti

  • Constructor Details

    • EmpDoc

      public EmpDoc()
      Default constructor. Initializes an empty Emp object.

    • EmpDoc

      public EmpDoc(int empId, String empName, float empSal)
      Parameterized constructor to initialize employee details.
      Parameters:
      empId - unique employee ID
      empName - name of the employee
      empSal - salary of the employee

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the employee object. This method is automatically called when the object is printed.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      formatted string containing employee details

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(EmpDoc e)
      Compares this employee object with another employee object based on employee ID.

      This method is used for sorting collections such as:

      • TreeSet
      • Collections.sort()
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<EmpDoc>
      Parameters:
      e - the employee object to be compared
      Returns:
      a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as this object is less than, equal to, or greater than the specified object
